title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at Canara Bank Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Canara Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gurgaon location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
